caption: A person's hands are shown mixing a coarse, light-brown textured food mixture inside a large silver metal bowl. In the upper left, the hands are actively tossing and stirring the ingredients. As the sequence progresses, the hands continue to move through the mixture, pushing and folding the food to ensure it is well combined. The bowl sits on a light-colored wooden surface. To the right of the bowl, two smaller containers are visible: a white plate holding more of the textured food and a small red bowl filled with white, round pieces of food. The person is wearing a light-colored, possibly translucent, garment on their arm. In the top left corner of each frame, there is a logo featuring stylized waves and the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION". The scene remains static except for the movement of the hands within the bowl.
